dropped_summary: Most frames were dropped due to showing lecturer-only, low-information UI states, or blurred/blocking elements. Duplicate screenshots and frames with no clear visual teaching artifacts (e.g., plain text without context, zoomed-in chat logs without structure) were excluded. Intro/outro scenes (e.g., frame_0012, frame_0013) and blank/background frames were also omitted.
